title: Editorial magazine feature spread — "THE MAKERS" 6-page duotone portrait feature: masked + duotone hero portraits, a pull-quote colour-splash, licensed Stock paper/ink textures, a CSV-data-merged contributors strip, a vectorized masthead, the whole spread laid out in InDesign and exported to print PDF, plus web crops
one_line_ask: Build a 6-page editorial magazine feature spread: editorially treat four raw hero portraits (straighten → crop → mask subject → soft background blur → full tonal grade → editorial duotone), create one pull-quote colour-splash frame (desaturate everything but a single garment colour), license two Adobe Stock paper/ink textures and grade them for the page grounds, vectorize a hand-drawn masthead glyph, recommend the display/body type, data-merge a five-name contributors strip from a roster CSV into an authored InDesign template, then lay the whole 6-page feature out and render it to a print-ready PDF, finishing with web-sized social crops of the hero.
deliverables: 6-page print-ready feature-spread PDF (CMYK intent, A4 trim + 3mm bleed) rendered from the authored InDesign layout
Four hero portraits, each masked off a softly blurred background and fully tonally graded into a consistent two-ink editorial duotone (ink shadows + warm paper highlights)
One pull-quote 'colour-splash' frame — full image desaturated to mono except one garment colour kept saturated, for the opening spread
Two Adobe Stock textures (uncoated paper grain + ink-bleed wash) licensed, graded and tinted to serve as page grounds
A vectorized (SVG/PDF) masthead/drop-cap glyph rendered from a hand-drawn scan via Illustrator
A data-merged contributors strip (5 contributors: name, role, city, headshot) merged from a roster CSV into the authored InDesign strip template
Recommended display + body typeface pairing for the feature, applied in the layout
Web/social crops of the duotone hero (1080x1350 portrait + 1080x1080 square) for the issue teaser
